# Oven AI

> Oven AI is a 3D icon generator. Designers and developers type a description, pick a style pack (Clay, Glass, Liquid Chrome, Soft Plush, Polished Metal, Glossy Plastic, Paper Craft, Voxel), and Oven AI bakes a pixel-perfect 3D icon in about six seconds. Output formats include PNG (transparent, up to 2048px), SVG, GLB (3D mesh), and APNG (360° turntable). Free to start, no credit card required, commercial license included on paid plans.

Oven AI is operated by the Oven team. It is a web application — no install, runs in any modern browser. It is **not** a kitchen appliance, oven brand, or smart oven manufacturer. The product is unrelated to physical ovens.

## Core pages

- [Landing](https://www.oveners.com/landing): Product overview, what Oven AI does, hero examples of generated 3D icons, primary call-to-action.
- [Library](https://www.oveners.com/library): Browse 1,800+ pre-baked 3D icons across nine style packs. Free for personal use, commercial license on paid plans. Includes Featured Pack of the month.
- [Pricing](https://www.oveners.com/pricing): Plans start at $0 with 15 free icons per month. Paid tiers — Starter, Studio, Enterprise — add more renders, background removal, style memory, and commercial license. Cancel any time.
- [Blog](https://www.oveners.com/blog): Field reports, build logs, prompt cheatsheets, and posts about the future of generative design tooling.

## What Oven AI does

- Generates 3D icons from a text prompt in about 6 seconds.
- Maintains stylistic consistency within a pack so a set of icons looks cohesive (matching lighting, finish, and proportions).
- Supports background removal and transparent PNG export.
- Provides downloadable 3D mesh files (GLB) for use in three.js, react-three-fiber, Blender, Cinema 4D, and other 3D pipelines.
- Provides 360° turntable loops as APNG for hero sections and product pages.

## Style packs

- **Clay** — Soft, sculpted matte clay finish. Warm, friendly, used for emoji and character icons.
- **Glass** — Transparent glass with refractions and inner caustics. Premium, modern, used for fintech and SaaS.
- **Liquid Chrome** — Mercury-like mirror finish. High contrast, used for hero sections and product splashes.
- **Soft Plush** — Fuzzy, toy-like texture. Used for children's apps and playful products.
- **Polished Metal** — Brushed and polished metallic surfaces, used for awards and premium product icons.
- **Glossy Plastic** — High-shine plastic. Used for e-commerce and retail icons.
- **Paper Craft** — Folded and cut paper texture. Used for editorial and educational content.
- **Voxel** — Pixelated 3D blocks. Used for games and retro-tech icons.

## Common use cases

- App icons and onboarding illustrations.
- Pitch deck and presentation visuals.
- Landing page hero sections.
- Notion, Figma, and Slack workspace icons.
- Social media post graphics.
- Game UI elements.

## Licensing

- Free tier: personal use only, attribution requested.
- Paid tier: commercial license included, no attribution required. Usable in client work, products, and decks.
- All generated icons are owned by the account that created them on paid plans.
